description: Disable Next.js link prefetching by default via custom Link component; app now uses @/components/link throughout.
Improve initial render: stream home grid after shell (Suspense + skeleton), add route loading UI, add Submission index for home feed query, defer tutorial data in app layout.
Open Graph images for submission, profile, portfolio, collection, and exhibit pages now load correctly; move opengraph-image metadata files outside (app) route group to fix 404s.
